inputs.name: message
inputs.description: Message text to post to Slack. Authentication is provided via environment/credential injection (`SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL` or `SLACK_BOT_TOKEN`).

inputs.name: channel
inputs.description: Target channel or user ID. If omitted, connector defaults are used.

inputs.name: username
inputs.description: Optional display username override for webhook mode.

inputs.name: icon_emoji
inputs.description: Optional emoji icon override for webhook mode.

inputs.name: attachments
inputs.description: Optional legacy Slack attachments payload (deprecated). Prefer blocks for new integrations.

inputs.name: blocks
inputs.description: Optional Slack Block Kit payload for modern message layouts. Recommended for new integrations.

outputs.name: sent
outputs.description: Always present. True when Slack accepted the message send request; false otherwise.

outputs.name: channel
outputs.description: Optional and typically present on successful sends (`sent=true`). Resolved Slack channel identifier or name used for delivery.

outputs.name: message
outputs.description: Optional and typically present on successful sends (`sent=true`). Posted message text content returned/echoed by the connector.

outputs.name: error
outputs.description: Optional and typically present on failed sends (`sent=false`). Sanitized error summary when delivery fails; empty or omitted on success.

outputs.name: error_code
outputs.description: Optional and typically present on failed sends (`sent=false`). Machine-readable error code when Slack delivery fails.
